pages.title: Nightwork
pages.text: The night is no longer just the dark half of the day. The moon rolls through four distinct faces — $(l:events/harvest_moon)harvest$(), $(l:events/full_moon)full$(), $(l:events/blood_moon)blood$(), and occasional $(l:events/star_shower)star showers$() — each with its own rules, dangers, and payoffs.$(br2)Between them, meteors fall. Mining the rock they leave behind is how you'll assemble the Meteor gear set.

pages.title: What's in this book
pages.text: $(l:events)Lunar Events$() — what each moon does and how to survive it.$(br)$(l:materials)Materials$() — the raw drops you'll farm.$(br)$(l:gear)Meteor Gear$() — the tool and armor set.$(br)$(l:commands)Commands$() — operator tools for testing and admin use.
